invalid_epic_id.pattern: Epic ID does not exist or is not linked to KATA-1760
invalid_epic_id.prevention: Verify epic exists and parent linkage before proceeding

permission_denied.pattern: User lacks permission to create tickets in epic
permission_denied.prevention: Check user permissions for KATA project and specific epic

duplicate_tickets.pattern: Ticket with same name already exists in epic
duplicate_tickets.prevention: Check for existing tickets with similar names before creation

invalid_release.pattern: Release version not found in JIRA project
invalid_release.prevention: Validate release against available versions in KATA project

link_type_unavailable.pattern: Requested link type not available in JIRA instance
link_type_unavailable.prevention: Check available link types before attempting to create links

epic_linked_to_initiative.description: Epic is properly linked to KATA-1760 initiative

consistent_naming.description: Ticket names follow consistent pattern for manager

valid_story_points.description: All story points are valid Fibonacci numbers
